content.TextMessage:
MOVE with WASD


SHOOT with LEFT MOUSE BUTTON to inflict VITALITY DAMAGE on BOSS


PARRY WHITE WAVE ATTACKS with SPACE to build CHARGE


When METER is CHARGED, RIGHT CLICK  when the boss is below 50% VITALITY to RELEASE CHARGE and inflict FATAL DAMAGE


Press any key to start

objects.name: TransparentButtonWithWhiteBlueBorder
objects.variant: Transparent Button With White Blue Border
